name: claude-notifications
description: All-in-one Claude Code notifications — sound alerts, OS notifications, and terminal focus. One-click setup, zero external dependencies.

commands.title: Claude Notifications: Set Up Claude Code Hooks
Claude Notifications: Remove Claude Code Hooks
Claude Notifications: Add Signal Files to Global Gitignore

claudeNotifications.autoSetupHooks.markdownDescription: Install and upgrade Claude Code hooks automatically. Uncheck to be prompted before any change to `~/.claude/settings.json`.

claudeNotifications.volume.markdownDescription: `0` = silent, `50` (default) ≈ typical OS notification, `100` = the sound file's native level. Your OS master volume still controls overall loudness.

claudeNotifications.waiting.action.description: What happens when Claude is waiting for your response.

enumItemLabels: Custom file — see Custom Sound Path below
enumDescriptions: Toast/banner still shows but no sound plays.
Cross-platform bundled chime designed for 'waiting' events.
Cross-platform bundled chime designed for 'completed' events.
Use the audio file at the Custom Sound Path below.
claudeNotifications.waiting.sound.markdownDescription: Sound for this event. [**Choose Sound…**](command:claudeNotifications.chooseSound?%5B%22waiting%22%5D) picks from your OS's system sounds with click-to-preview; [**Preview**](command:claudeNotifications.previewSound) plays your current sounds.

claudeNotifications.waiting.customSoundP.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a custom audio file. Used only when the Sound above is set to `Custom file`.

claudeNotifications.completed.action.description: What happens when Claude finishes a task.

enumItemLabels: Custom file — see Custom Sound Path below
enumDescriptions: Toast/banner still shows but no sound plays.
Cross-platform bundled chime designed for 'waiting' events.
Cross-platform bundled chime designed for 'completed' events.
Use the audio file at the Custom Sound Path below.
claudeNotifications.completed.sound.markdownDescription: Sound for this event. [**Choose Sound…**](command:claudeNotifications.chooseSound?%5B%22completed%22%5D) picks from your OS's system sounds with click-to-preview; [**Preview**](command:claudeNotifications.previewSound) plays your current sounds.

claudeNotifications.completed.customSoun.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a custom audio file. Used only when the Sound above is set to `Custom file`.

enumDescriptions: Play the configured audio cue even when you're already on the matching terminal.
No sound or toast when you're already on the matching terminal.
claudeNotifications.soundWhenFocused.description: What to do when you're already on the terminal Claude just wrote to.
